untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires detection of: (1) two distinct peaks at similar price levels separated by time (months), (2) valley floor identification between peaks, (3) peak shape analysis (narrow vs rounded), and (4) visual pattern recognition. These multi-bar temporal pattern features cannot be expressed using only point-in-time price and technical indicators. The confirmation signal (price below valley floor) can be approximated with support levels, but the core pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition or custom pattern-matching logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The entry condition approximates the breakout below the valley using support level (s1), and exit uses resistance (r1) as a reversal signal. However, this is a simplified proxy that does not capture the full nuance of the Double Top pattern formation, which requires temporal analysis of peak shapes and separation.
